problem:
fix(langgraph): add missing stacklevel to warnings.warn() calls. Several `warnings.warn()` calls are missing `stacklevel`, so the warning source location points to framework internals instead of the user's call site.
 
Most calls already set `stacklevel=2` correctly . The following 6 do not:
 
| File | Line | Warning |
|---|---|---|
| `graph/state.py` | 116 | Invalid `state_schema` |
| `graph/state.py` | 752 | Deprecated `retry` param |
| `graph/state.py` | 760 | Deprecated `input` param |
| `gr (npm config set registry is not working — it seems correct per old docs)
memory_hint: Use npmrc for registry config. The old syntax was removed.
failure_without_memory: Keeps using npm config set registry which is deprecated. Endless debugging.
